effect:
**Divine Relic** *(You can only have one card with this keyword in your material deck.)*

**Banish CARDNAME:** All basic elements are enabled for you until end of turn. *(Fire, water, and wind are basic elements.)*
effect_raw:
Divine Relic (You can only have one card with this keyword in your material deck.)

Banish Imperial Seal: All basic elements are enabled for you until end of turn. (Fire, water, and wind are basic elements.)
name: Imperial Seal

rule.description: Imperial Seal will not change the element of your champion, and therefore won't grant Element Bonuses for basic elements.

effect_html: Divine Relic (You can only have one card with this keyword in your material deck.)Banish Imperial Seal: All basic elements are enabled for you until end of turn. (Fire, water, and wind are basic elements.)

effect:
As an additional cost to materialize this card, banish three fire element cards from your graveyard. 

[Class Bonus] **On Attack:** You may discard a fire element card and have CARDNAME deal 2 unpreventable damage to your champion. If you do, this attack gets +2 [POWER] and gains "**On Champion Hit:** Draw a card."
effect_raw:
As an additional cost to materialize this card, banish three fire element cards from your graveyard. 

[Class Bonus] On Attack: You may discard a fire element card and have Dragon's Dawn deal 2 unpreventable damage to your champion. If you do, this attack gets +2 POWER and gains "On Champion Hit: Draw a card."
name: Dragon's Dawn
effect_html: As an additional cost to materialize this card, banish three fire element cards from your graveyard. Class Bonus On Attack: You may discard a fire element card and have Dragon's Dawn deal 2 unpreventable damage to your champion. If you do, this attack gets +2 and gains "On Champion Hit: Draw a card."

effect:
Whenever a fire element Spell source you control deals damage, put a **refinement** counter on CARDNAME.

[Class Bonus] **Banish CARDNAME:** As a Spell, deal 4 damage to target champion. Activate this ability only if there are three or more **refinement** counters on CARDNAME.
effect_raw:
Whenever a fire element Spell source you control deals damage, put a refinement counter on Everflame Staff.

[Class Bonus] Banish Everflame Staff: As a Spell, deal 4 damage to target champion. Activate this ability only if there are three or more refinement counters on Everflame Staff.
name: Everflame Staff

rule.description: Each instance of non-combat damage triggers Everflame Staff's ability. For effects that deal damage to multiple objects, each object that was dealt damage will count as one instance for Everflame Staff.

effect_html: Whenever a fire element Spell source you control deals damage, put a refinement counter on Everflame Staff.Class Bonus Banish Everflame Staff: As a Spell, deal 4 damage to target champion. Activate this ability only if there are three or more refinement counters on Everflame Staff.

effect:
**Hindered** *(This object enters the field rested)*

[REST]**: Empower 2**. Activate this ability only if your Shifting Currents face East or West.

[REST], **Banish CARDNAME:** **Empower X**, where **X** is the amount of water element cards in your graveyard. Activate this ability only at slow speed and only if your Shifting Currents face North or South.
effect_raw:
Hindered (This object enters the field rested)

REST: Empower 2. Activate this ability only if your Shifting Currents face East or West.

REST, Banish Ebbing Tide: Empower X, where X is the amount of water element cards in your graveyard. Activate this ability only at slow speed and only if your Shifting Currents face North or South.
name: Ebbing Tide
effect_html: Hindered (This object enters the field rested): Empower 2. Activate this ability only if your Shifting Currents face East or West., Banish Ebbing Tide: Empower X, where X is the amount of water element cards in your graveyard. Activate this ability only at slow speed and only if your Shifting Currents face North or South.

editions.effect:
Put a **buff** counter on each ally you control.

If you control exactly three %unique allies%allies that are all unique%, they each get +2 [POWER] until end of turn.
editions.effect_raw:
Put a buff counter on each ally you control.

If you control exactly three allies that are all unique, they each get +2 POWER until end of turn.
editions.flavor: "Though of different heritage, we come together as sisters, sworn to protect in danger and aid in crisis."

rule.description: Exactly three allies means you must control only three allies and they must each be unique.

rule.description: 'If you control exactly three unique allies -> If you control exactly three allies that are all unique'

editions.effect:
%%As an additional cost to activate this card, rest your champion.%

[Class Bonus] You may activate this card from your graveyard. If you do, banish it as it resolves.

[Class Bonus] You may activate this card from your banishment. If you do, put it on the bottom of your deck as it resolves.

%%**Glimpse 2** and **recover 2**.%

rule.description: If Three Visits is in a banishment and is then turned face down due to an effect like Orb of Sealing's, its owner can still activate it because that player is allowed to look at that card and see the ability that grants the activation permission.

effect:
If damage would be dealt to your champion while CARDNAME has two or less **charge** counters on it, prevent 2 of that damage and put a **charge** counter on CARDNAME instead.

[Kongming Bonus] **Sacrifice CARDNAME:** **Empower 7**. Activate this ability only if there are three **charge** counters on CARDNAME and only if your Shifting Currents face South.
effect_raw:
If damage would be dealt to your champion while Bairui has two or less charge counters on it, prevent 2 of that damage and put a charge counter on Bairui instead.

[Kongming Bonus] Sacrifice Bairui: Empower 7. Activate this ability only if there are three charge counters on Bairui and only if your Shifting Currents face South.
